app.title: ProductCanvas AI
app.subtitle: AI image studio from templates
template.importHint: Import a template first: drag PNG/JPG/WebP here or use the button
template.reorderHint: Drag and drop templates to reorder
template.empty: No template yet. Please import one.
template.importInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP can be imported as templates.
template.changeRequest.placeholder: e.g. change neon frame from blue to red, enlarge logo…
template.lockedHint: Template is locked – accept or reject the AI preview first.
template.changeOptionalHint: Optional when another output format is selected – then only change format and generate.
template.needChangeOrSize: Enter a change request or choose a different output format.
template.previewEmpty: Generate an AI preview to compare.
refs.title: Reference product images
refs.dropHint: Drag images here or use the button
refs.reorderHint: Drag to reorder – first image = main reference
refs.usageHint: Reference images are used for prompt building and image generation (faithful product reproduction).
refs.dropInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP are supported.
settings.title: Settings
settings.imageOptionsHint: Size and quality passed to Bridge/Codex (as in AI Gateway / PMS).
preview.empty: Generate an image to see the preview.
preview.fullscreenClose: Click or press Esc to close
template.compareHint: Original and AI preview side by side – Esc to close
template.editorRefHint: Optional – e.g. use background, texture, or mood from this image in your change request.
template.editorRefEmpty: No reference image yet. Drag here or use the button.
template.editorRefDropInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, or WebP are supported.
wait.title: Please wait
bridge.setup.title: Set up Codex Local Bridge
bridge.setup.pairingCode: Pairing code (6 digits from tray app)
bridge.status.needsPairing: Pairing required – enter 6-digit code from Bridge tray
bridge.status.title: Bridge status
error.needsPairing: This app is not paired with Codex Local Bridge yet. Enter the pairing code from the Bridge tray and click Connect.
error.bodyTooLarge: Reference images were too large for the Bridge. They were resized automatically – please try again. See debug log for details.
error.referenceAttachFailed: Could not attach reference images to the Bridge. Check the debug log and try again.
error.bridgeTimeout: Image generation is taking longer than usual or the Bridge is not responding. Check Bridge tray status and try again.
debug.title: Debug log
debug.refsNotForwarded: Warning: references in HTTP payload but not sent to Codex (--image). Bridge ≥ 1.0.4 required.
prompt.pendingPreflight: Created when you click Generate image (preflight with references).
